testcase.name: getFavorites_ShouldReturnPage

error.message: Cannot instantiate @InjectMocks field named 'favoriteService' of type 'class com.animeapi.service.FavoriteService'. You haven't provided the instance at field declaration so I tried to construct the instance. However the constructor or the initialization block threw an exception : Unresolved compilation problems: The blank final field favoriteRepository may not have been initialized The blank final field animeRepository may not have been initialized The blank final field animeService may not have been initialized The method getId() is undefined for the type User The method builder() is undefined for the type Favorite log cannot be resolved The method getId() is undefined for the type User The method getId() is undefined for the type User log cannot be resolved The method getId() is undefined for the type User The method getId() is undefined for the type User
